headline: Morgan Stanley revamps Oracle stock price target
summary: Oracle (ORCL) is a tech giant. Its revenue sources are enterprise software, cloud services, and database technologies. Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI) unit has become the primary driver of the stock's growth, thanks to the AI boom. On top of everything you’d expect in their offerings, the company ...

headline: Bank Of America Backs US$16b AI Data Center And Fee Potential
summary: Bank of America (NYSE:BAC) is helping lead a US$16b financing package for a new data center campus in Michigan. The project is designed to support AI infrastructure needs for Oracle and OpenAI. The financing positions Bank of America as a key structuring agent and financial advisor on one of the largest purpose built data center projects in the US. For Bank of America, this deal sits at the intersection of traditional corporate banking and the build out of AI focused digital infrastructure...

headline: Dan Ives sends a blunt message to investors fleeing Oracle stock
summary: Wall Street has a short memory and an even shorter fuse. When a stock cracks, conviction tends to follow price, not the other way around. Investors who loved a company at $300 will quietly hate it at $145, even when the underlying business has barely budged. That pattern has been playing out in ...
